prompt: In a 6-max unopened pot, hero is on the button with KJo. Which compact preflop action fits best when late position does the heavy lifting?
why_v1: On the button in an unopened 6-max pot, KJo gains enough late-position leverage to become a clean raise.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. On the button in an unopened 6-max pot, KJo picks up enough late-position leverage to become a clean raise.
